parents.subject: LU-14629 sec: do not block rename of topmost encrypted dir

commit.subject: LU-15054 osc: Improve osc_update_pending debug
commit.message:
LU-15054 osc: Improve osc_update_pending debug

We can add the current count of pending pages and I/Os to
the debug in osc_update_pending by switching to
atomic_add_return.  This information is useful, so let's
do it.

Test-parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9c502f6009d110ef8a1fe862c2cf1574379e99e1
